name: Spiced Meat Skillet (Timen Ajami)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Ground lean beef or lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until it becomes tender.
3. Add the ground beef or lamb to the skillet. Cook until browned and crumbly.
4. If necessary, drain off any excess fat.
5. Stir in the allspice, curry powder, salt, and pepper.
6. Cook for 3 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
7. Add the remaining ingredients: rose water, dried currants, and chopped almonds.
8. Reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet.
9. Simmer over low heat for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
10. Serve hot.
